entry.title: Re: Exchange Rate Differences show incorrect amount
entry.content:
Hello, 

SAP KBA 3366138 .  This is a good starting point to try and understand what the system is doing and the implications of the account currency. 

Look at individual transactions and see if they make sense. If they still don't make sense, give us some more details about the transactions and maybe screenshots of the account currency and Journal Entries with all currencies displayed. 

We hope that helps,

Jesper

Do check our support blogs: https://blogs.sap.com/tag/b1-support-spotlight/

...and our Guided Answers.

entry.title: Re: How to kill a task in DWC ?
entry.content:
Hello,

How did you solve it? Do you have to enter the HANA Cockpit?

Greetings!

entry.title: Re: Can I build the P.R release strategy based on requisi...
entry.content:
Hi,

Yes, you can trigger the Purchase Requisition (PR) release strategy based on the requisitioner field in the PR. To achieve this, you need to maintain a Z-table for all the input fields related to the requisitioner. Additionally, provide a drop-down menu for the requisitioner field. The release strategy will be triggered based on the selected requisitioner. The respective users will be given authorizations only by the authorized requisitioner maintained in the role.

Note that there is no specific object for the transaction code ME51N. Therefore, we have implemented a custom object i.e. ZREQST, to manage this functionality.

Reference link here

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/pr-release-strategy-field/qaq-p/8474728

Regards

entry.title: Re: [SAP BTP Onboarding Series] Joule – Getting Started with Joule and SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi @dyasser,

Thank you, for the feedback. Happy to see that the blog is helping.

To answer your question, Joule will remain a single line item while you look at your entitlements. However, it can be used for multiple setup like Preview or production and it should work good. Same applies for Workzone - foundation edition which is always free. 

Hope this helps with your question.

Regards,

Nagesh

entry.title: Re: Change Key field in table
entry.content:
Hello @rajsapabap-tech ,

If you change the key fields, the table will need adjustment. See Adjustment of Database Structures .
This can lead to a loss of data, depending on the new table key and the availability of the table during the adjustment period. 

In your case you will probably not lose anything from the key change, since you are adding a key field, but the table will be unavailable to calling programms during the adjustment period and this can lead to runtime errors, loss of data etc. Meaning it can create problems somewhere else.

entry.title: Honey, I Shrunk the General Settings
entry.content:
If you wonder where the ‘General Settings’ disappeared in Web Client, this blog will tell you where to find it.

Starting from SAP Business One 10.0 Feature Pack (FP) 2405, the content of the ‘General Settings’ as you know it in the desktop client, is available in the Web Client, organized by the different modules.

This is part of a bigger restructuring of the Administration menu in Web Client that consolidates the settings and setup to be under the respective modules. The reason behind this change is that in desktop client, the configuration of a module is distributed across many forms in SAP Business One, some under General Settings, some under Company Details and so on - in Web Client, we’ve organized the configuration by SAP Business One modules (e.g., Inventory, Accounting, etc.) so you will find all related configurations in one place.

Terminology wise, Configuration = ‘Settings’ + ‘Setup’, where ‘Settings’ refer to values represented by checkbox, radio button and list of values, while ‘Setup’ refers to records of setup data, such as Item groups.

The configuration model in Web Client is illustrated as follows:

 

Sub-module is a logical split of the configuration module, related to a specific functionality.

The module and sub-modules are listed on the tree menu and the related Settings/Setup appear both as a menu entry (in the tree) and as the content itself in the main area across one or more tabs.

While in SAP Business One desktop client, Settings and Setup can be in the same window, in Web Client it is separated, i.e., setting and setup are in different menus.

This model is flexible and adjusted according to the module content – a module can have zero or more sub-modules/settings menus/setup menus, depends on the module nature and content richness.

Let’s see some examples – first example is for the ‘Payments and Banking’ module:

As can be seen, this module contains two sub-modules: Banking and Payments. Each contains only Setup records, such as Banks and Credit Cards. In this specific module there are no Settings menus.

 

A second example is the ‘Sales and Purchasing’ module:

This module contains no sub-modules; it contains three Settings menus and one Setup menu (Freights). The Settings menu is divided to several tabs on the main area for better usability. Many of the ‘General Settings’ items in desktop client that are related to documents are now available under this module.

 

Since some of the new settings menus in Web Client do not exist in desktop client, we’ve added new entries in the Authorization tree to support the authorizations for these forms.

The configuration menus are searchable (both settings and setup menus) and linkable – you can access the setup/settings page by using the ‘Define New’ option (e.g., from Business Partner master data, jump directly to Business Partner Customer Group to define a new setup record).

To conclude, the new configuration framework in Web Client consolidates all configuration elements under their respective module, offering easier orientation and navigation to configure your solution.

entry.title: Transition from SAP Enterprise Support reporting cockpit to SAP for Me Customer Insights dashboard
entry.content:
We are excited to announce that the the planned transition from the SAP Enterprise Support Reporting Cockpit to the new SAP for Me reporting has been completed and now the new interactive analytical  Customer Insights dashboard in SAP for Me is fully replacing the SAP ES reporting cockpit.

SAP ES reporting cockpit was originally created for the SAP ONE Support Launchpad and has being displayed embedded into SAP for Me starting from May 2023. At the same time we have been steadily developing the successor  - The 'Customer Insights' reporting dashboard' in SAP for Me, which has already been live since September 2023. The new Customer Insights dashboard offers far more upgraded features with a user-friendly interface, extended data, combined deployment approach, and enhanced performance. The development has been done  in close collaboration with customer user group and based on customers' feedback.

SAP Enterprise Support reporting cockpit will be sunset by the end of June 2024. 

Going forward, all updates, changes, and improvements will be incorporated solely into the Customer Insights dashboard, emphasizing its importance and long-term functionality. We highly encourage you to use and familiarize yourself with this new feature and provide us with your invaluable feedback. This will help us make further improvements to the reporting system designed for you.

To access the new dashboard, make sure your S-user possesses the 'Display Support Situation Reporting' authorization, which can be provided by your super administrator. For more details kindly refer to this KBA.

Please visit Customer Insights  portal page to stay up-to-date and get all information on access and authorization, latest updates, road map, trainings and info sessions, FAQs and more.

We hope, you will love the new reporting application Customer Insights Dashboard and enjoy using it to make the most of what it has to offer.

Thank you for your support during this transition.

Please use the ‘Feedback’ slider on the right edge of the page of the application to share with us your feedback on this new tool and help us to improve the reporting functionality in SAP for Me.

Stay updated by subscribing to this blog and visiting the SAP Support Portal / Customer Insights.

SAP for Me is made for you!

Related blogs:  all related blogs to ‘Customer Insights’ reporting dashboard,

entry.title: Re: Edge Integration Cell Setup with AWS
entry.content:
In the end we were able to solve the issue (not on AWS but on SUSE Rancher in a private landscape).

The issue was related to cluster configuration that wasn't fully compliant with longhorn requirements with SUSE Rancher. My suggestion is to double check the cluster configuration to verify if everything is fine.

entry.title: Re: BTP Integration Suite API Management and Stage Releva...
entry.content:
Hi Alex, 

For URLs and credentials you can utilize the Key Value Map capability of the APIM solution. Still you have to maintain it once like with configuration in Cloud Integration but after transport it will stay available. We do encrypt the credentials but URLs and other config we are just using without encryption. To make clear what something is in KVM we are using the API proxy name at least or a specific generic name and a prefix for Url or authentication type.

Hopefully this is giving you an insight of a possible option.

Kind regards, 

Jordy

entry.title: Re: Requester Dept For P.R
entry.content:
Hi,

Refer to this link

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/add-user-defined-filed-to-pr-item-screen-in-me51n-create-pr/qaq-p/5226141

Regards

entry.title: Re: Schedule a background job to execute a Transactions
entry.content: There are multiple guides on how to schedule a Background Job in SM36 including the link i posted above. You can test your solution with a z program.

entry.title: Depreciation not calculating for fixed assets
entry.content:
Hi,

Depreciation is not calculating for fixed assets for period 12 in previous fiscal year.

The capitilized date, depreciation start date is 01.03.2024. Acquisition date = 01.04.2024, Asset value date = 01.04.2024

These are assets that were uploaded through the migration cockpit as bulk uploads in 05.2024.

Why could this be happening?

entry.title: Enterprise Portal BW reports after Netweaver EOL
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I'm currently working on an BW 7.5 on HANA landscape, with plans to upgrade to BW/4HANA in the near future. Considering part of our applications rely on Enterprise Portal to display the reports (web based), what is the usual/recommended path for these reports following the 2027 Netweaver end of life? I know and we do use AfO and SAC in some cases but I'm wondering about a web based solution.

Thanks!

Gabriel

entry.title: Re: Hi experts Which table to refer to view physical qty...
entry.content:
Hi Hiteshrao,

Below are some important tables related to EWM. I hope you find them helpful.

/SCWM/QUAN Quant Attributes
/LIME/NQUANLIME - Stock Quantities
/SCWM/STOCK_IW01WME - Stock Key Material Batch
/SCWM/STOCK_IW03WME - Stock Key Material, Batch, Reference Document
/SCWM/STOCK_IW04WME - Stock Key Material, Sales Order, Project
/SCWM/ORDIM_C Warehouse Tasks Confirmed
/SCWM/ORDIM_CS Serial Numbers for Confirmed Warehouse Task Item
/SCWM/ORDIM_E Exception Codes for Warehouse Task
/SCWM/ORDIM_O Warehouse Tasks Open
/SCWM/ORDIM_OS Serial Number Items for Open Warehouse Tasks
/SCWM/WAVEHDR Wave - Header Information
/SCWM/WAVEITM Wave - Item
/SCDL/DB_DLVH_O Outbound Delivery Header
/SCDL/DB_DLVI_O Outbound Delivery Item
/SCDL/DB_PROCH_O Outbound Delivery Order Header
/SCDL/DB_PROCI_O Outbound Delivery Order Item
/SCDL/DB_PROCH_I Inbound Delivery - Header
/SCDL/DB_PROCI_I Inbound Delivery - Item
/SCDL/DB_REFDOC Reference
/SCDL/DB_REQH Header Inbound Delivery Notification/Outbound Delivery Req.
/SCDL/DB_REQI Item Inbound Delivery Notification / Outbound Del. Request
/SCWM/HUHDR Handling unit header
/HUSSTAT Individual Status for Each Handling
/SCWM Unit/SCWM/HUREF Handling Unit
/SCWM/HUSTOBJ Information about HU Status
/SCWM/GMHUHDR Handling Unit Header of a Goods Movement Log
/SCWM/GMHUITM Handling Unit Item
/SCWM/GMHUSTATHU Status of HUs from Goods Movement Log
/SCWM/GMHUIDENT Additional HU Identificationss for a Goods Movement Log Reference Object
/SCWM/LAGP Storage Bins
/SCWM/LAGPS Bins for Execution Areas and Activit
/SAPAPO/MATKEY Product
/SAPAPO/MATLWH Location Product for Location Warehouse
/SAPAPO/MATLWHST Location Product for Location Whse and Subloc. Storage Type
/SAPAPO/MATTXT Material Descriptions
/SAPAPO/MATEXEC Product: Execution Data
/SAPAPO/MATMAP Mapping Table for Products
/LIME/PI_PAR_BIZ Physical Inventory Document Business Key Parent Object#project #warehouse #ewm
/LIME/PI_LOGITEM Log Table for Item Data of a Physical Inventory Document
/LIME/PI_LOGHIST History Table for Physical Inventory LOG Entries
/LIME/PI_LOGHEAD Log Table for Header Data of a Physical Inventory Document
/LIME/PI_IT_BIZ Physical Inventory Document Business Key Item Object
/LIME/PI_DOC_TB Quantities for Physical Inventory Document Items
/LIME/PI_DOC_SER Serial Numbers for Physical Inventory Document Items
/LIME/PI_DOC_IT Table of Physical Inventory Document Items
/LIME/PI_DOCTYPE Document Types of Physical Inventory (Internal Settings)
/LIME/PI_DCTYTXT Description of Phys. Inventory ProcedureM


Regards
Faraz Rahim

entry.title: Re: MDK - Asset Manager - build - ERROR node:crypto
entry.content: Thank you. "uuid@9.0.1" worked.

entry.title: Re: Purchasing document 4600000022 not subject to release...
entry.content: Check SAP note 2565597

entry.title: Re: Extending SAP Fiori elements the right way using standard processes
entry.content:
Thanks Macel for the blog,

But what happen if i need to get the entries in a table? To know the binding path.... i guess you would say that getting with getView().byId is not correct to get the binding right? do you know other alternative for doing something like that?

let oTable = this.getView().byId(..)

oTable.getBinding().getPath()

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Gen AI - Using Streamlit Python Library to Chat with Multiple PDF's via RAG and HANA Vector Engi

entry.title: Don't want to start from scratch with IT Governance? - Try the SAP Build Governance Resource Center
entry.content:
When thinking about IT governance, it doesn't always seem like a rewarding or exciting thing. It can feel like a huge, intimidating journey with countless considerations and tasks to build from scratch. Thoughts like “How are we going to govern the collaboration of pro-coders and low-code developers?” “What are appropriate role collections?” “How are we going to make sure that everyone knows the rules?” “How are we going to prioritize and keep track of possible projects?” can seem quite overwhelming. Especially in the context of low-code development IT Governance is a crucial role – as these development techniques are not yet familiar for everyone and need a transparent and clear framework to operate in.

But you don’t need to start puzzle over these questions from scratch! In addition to SAP BTP’s governance, the SAP Build Governance Resource Center is here to simplify and streamline your fusion development efforts, providing a robust governance framework to ensure your projects are delivered quickly, securely, and efficiently. Get access to it here!

For IT administrators and professionals looking to streamline and scale their fusion development efforts, having a robust governance framework is crucial. Effective governance ensures that projects are not only delivered quickly but also securely and efficiently, aligning with organizational standards and objectives. 

 

What's Inside the SAP Build Governance Resource Center?

The Resource Center is packed with valuable assets that cater to your diverse needs. Here’s a sneak peek into what you can find:

Technical Templates – Ready to download and import!

  • Digital Center of Excellence Toolkit: This template is essential for setting up a centralized hub where your developers, business users and everyone interested can connect, share, and grow their fusion development projects. It includes everything from general guidelines to advanced features tailored for your brand, making it a breeze to establish best practices and governance.
  • Use Case Buddy Tool: Simplify and standardize your use case ideation process with this tool. It helps you manage, analyze, and streamline your IT projects by enabling a seamless workflow from idea submission to review and approval. See this blog post or this demo for further details.

 

Content Resources – Ready to inform and inspire!

  • How-To Guides:
    • Fusion Development & Use Case Ideation: Learn the essentials of fusion development and how to ideate impactful use cases effectively.
    • Fusion Development Project Lifecycle & Center of Excellence: Master the phases of project development and how to set up and manage a Fusion Development Program.
  • Overview Presentation on SAP Build Governance: Gain comprehensive insights into the governance frameworks and capabilities of SAP Build. This presentation is perfect for understanding the broader picture and aligning your strategies with SAP's best practices.
  • FAQ on SAP Build Governance: Address common queries and challenges with detailed FAQs that cover everything from onboarding to security and monitoring.

 

Guided Experiences and Help Documentation – Ready to point you to more resources!

  • Quick Links: Sign up for SAP BTP Free Tier and activate various Service Boosters for SAP Build Apps, Process Automation, and Work Zone.
  • Essential SAP Help Documentation: Including best practices, security recommendations, and administration guides.

 

How to Get Started?

Getting started with the SAP Build Governance Resource Center is simple. Get access here and be personally invited to join the site!

Navigate through site to access a wealth of resources designed to support your fusion initiatives:

  • Explore Technical Templates: Download the Digital Center of Excellence and Use Case Buddy templates to kickstart your projects.
  • Dive into Content Resources: Review presentations, how-to guides, and FAQs to build a strong foundation in SAP Build Governance.
  • Utilize Guided Experiences: Follow step-by-step tutorials and documentation to seamlessly integrate SAP Build capabilities into your workflow.

Still not sure how you can make it work for you? Use this overview to see how it would turn out:

 

Empowering Your Fusion Development Journey with SAP Build

The SAP Build Governance Resource Center serves as your comprehensive guide to navigating the complexities of fusion development development and introducing new approaches like low-code development. By providing a centralized repository of tools, templates, and resources, it equips you with everything you need to implement, manage, and scale fusion projects effectively.

By consolidating all these resources into a single, easy-to-navigate platform, the SAP Build Governance Resource Center empowers you to operate and scale your fusion development programs with confidence. Whether you are just starting or looking to optimize your existing processes, this resource center is your go-to destination for all things SAP Build.

Start exploring SAP Build Governance Resource Center today and unlock the full potential of fusion development!

entry.title: Draft Conversion Triggers Duplicate Approval in SAP Business One Service Layer
entry.content:
Problem Statement: Draft Conversion Triggers Duplicate Approval in SAP Business One Service Layer

Hello SAP Community,

I’m encountering an issue with the DraftsService_SaveDraftToDocument service in SAP Business One, and I’m hoping someone can provide guidance or a solution.

Scenario:

  • System: SAP Business One (Service Layer)
  • Process: Converting a draft Approved Purchase Order (PO) to a final document

Issue:

When I use the DraftsService_SaveDraftToDocument service to convert an approved draft PO to a final document, it triggers the approval process again. Here’s the detailed workflow:

  1. Create a PO: The PO draft is created and submitted for approval.
  2. Approval Process: The PO draft goes through the approval process and is approved.
  3. Convert Draft to Document: I use the DraftsService_SaveDraftToDocument service to convert the approved draft to a final document.
  4. Re-trigger Approval: The conversion process re-triggers the approval, and I have to approve it again. Only after the second approval does the document get saved by calling DraftsService_SaveDraftToDocument.

Observations:

  • The approval template is set to “Always” check for approvals.
  • The document status before conversion is fully approved.

Payload Example:

Here is the JSON payload I am using for the conversion:

 

{
  "Document": {
    "DocEntry": 12345
}
}

 

Steps Taken:

  • Verified that the approval template settings are correct and do not have duplicate conditions.
  • Ensured the draft status is fully approved before conversion.

General Settings

Template Settings

SAP Version

 

 

Question:

Has anyone experienced similar issues with the DraftsService_SaveDraftToDocument service? How can I prevent the approval process from being re-triggered upon conversion of the approved draft to a final document?

Any insights or solutions would be greatly appreciated. Thank you!

@ANKIT_CHAUHAN

entry.title: Re: The item table update always ends with runtime error...
entry.content: Short Text The current program has intentionally triggered a termination with a short dump. Runtime Error RAISE_SHORTDUMP Exception CX_CSP_ACT_INTERNAL Program CL_CSP_ACT_SAVE_TO_DB=========CP Application Component BC-ESI-RAP-CSP Date/Time 06/13/2024 08:25:01 (System) User CB9980000000 (Jacky Admin) Client 100 Host appserver-l5gdx What happened? The current program has recognised an error that it could not handle adequately. To reverse any database changes made and to save information for further analysis, the program has intentionally triggered a short dump using the language elements RAISE SHORTDUMP or THROW SHORTDUMP. For more information follow the link:ABAP Keyword Documentation. Error analysis The program has indicated exception "CX_CSP_ACT_INTERNAL" as the reason for the termination: SQL operation 'UPDATE' returned unexpected sy-subrc '4'. Information on where terminated The termination occurred in ABAP program or include "CL_CSP_ACT_SAVE_TO_DB=========CP", in "LIF_SINGLE_ENTITY_HANDLER~PERFORM_DB_OPERATIONS". The main program was "SAPMSSY4". In the source code, the termination point is in line 1317 of include "CL_CSP_ACT_SAVE_TO_DB=========CCIMP". include "CL_CSP_ACT_SAVE_TO_DB=========CCIMP". Source Code Extract 1302 1303 1304 1305 1306 1307 1308 1309 1310 1311 1312 1313 1314 1315 1316 >>>> 1318 1319 1320 1321 1322 1323 1324 1325 1326 CATCH cx_dynamic_check INTO lx_dynamic. RAISE SHORTDUMP lcl_exception_provider_factory=>get_instance( )->create_exception_provider( iv_entity_name = is_modify_db-entity_name iv_persistence_name = lv_persistence_name )->create_exception_from_previous( ix_previous = lx_dynamic io_update_scheme = io_update_scheme it_instance = is_modify_db-updates_ref->* )->enrich( ). ENDTRY. IF ls_sql_return-subrc <> 0. RAISE SHORTDUMP lcl_exception_provider_factory=>get_instance( )->create_exception_provider( iv_entity_name = is_modify_db-entity_name iv_persistence_name = lv_persistence_name )->create_subrc_ne_0_exception( iv_subrc = ls_sql_return-subrc iv_sql_operation_name = c_sql_operation_name-update )->enrich( ). ENDIF. ENDIF. Active Calls/Events No. Event Program Include Line 13 LIF_SINGLE_ENTITY_HANDLER~PERFORM_DB_OPERATIONS CL_CSP_ACT_SAVE_TO_DB=========CP CL_CSP_ACT_SAVE_TO_DB=========CCIMP 1317 12 LIF_IMPLEMENTATION~EXECUTE CL_CSP_ACT_SAVE_TO_DB=========CP CL_CSP_ACT_SAVE_TO_DB=========CCIMP 1402 11 IF_CSP_PRC_ACT_PERSIST_RAW~EXECUTE CL_CSP_ACT_SAVE_TO_DB=========CP CL_CSP_ACT_SAVE_TO_DB=========CM007 3 10 IF_CSP_RT_PROCESS~EXECUTE_ACTIVITY CL_CSP_PRC_PERSIST_RAW========CP CL_CSP_PRC_PERSIST_RAW========CM002 2 9 IF_CSP_RT_PROCESS_ENGINE~RUN CL_CSP_RT_PROCESS_ENGINE======CP CL_CSP_RT_PROCESS_ENGINE======CM001 34 8 IF_CSP_RT_CATALOG_PROCESS_STRT~RUN CL_CSP_CATALOG_PROCESS_START==CP CL_CSP_CATALOG_PROCESS_START==CM002 12 7 RUN CL_CSP_CATALOG_PROCESS_START==CP CL_CSP_CATALOG_PROCESS_START==CM004 2 6 IF_CSP_PRC_PERSIST_RAW~PERSIST CL_CSP_PRC_PERSIST_RAW========CP CL_CSP_PRC_PERSIST_RAW========CM001 6 5 SCSP_PERSIST_RAW SAPLSCSP_UPDATE LSCSP_UPDATEU01 17 4 SCSP_PERSIST_RAW SAPLSCSP_UPDATE LSCSP_UPDATEU01 5 3 %_UPDATES_NO_UTASK SAPMSSY4 SAPMSSY4 136 2 LOCAL_UPDATE_TASK SAPMSSY4 SAPMSSY4 42 1 START-OF-SELECTION SAPMSSY4

entry.title: Re: Type message VL 455
entry.content:
Hi friend,

I have this issue nowadays so I am answering your question here. After checking all the possibilities listed in the forum, I found that my issue was still there. so I removed Delivery tolerance at the sales order level.

This issue is also related to the Delivery Tolerance set at the customer master. I have removed the tolerance at the sales order/customer master. then you can process the delivery.

Thanks!!

entry.title: conditional breaks Adobe Form
entry.content:
I am trying to make a conditional break based on one of the fields of the table. However, it did not work.
here are screenshots for all steps I did:

I want the conditional break to happen with the change of CYCLE value.
I want the form to be like this:

but instead this happened:

ABAP Development SAP Forms service by Adobe

entry.title: Re: AIF errors cancelled by mistake
entry.content:
Hello, 

When you cancel messages , if this is an idoc you set by this action to 68 who means archivable.

You can go in SAP ALE to change the idoc status (BD87 and restric and process) back to 51 for exemple and then you can reprocess it.

Pierre

entry.title: How to create additional depreciation areas in public cloud ?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

The customer needs additional depreciation areas to follow some asset valuated amounts seperately.

The scope item "Asset Accounting – Additional Depreciation Area"-5HG is active in CBC, however system does not allow to create new depreciation areas in configuration or there is no added depreciation area delivered by SAP. Only two standard depreciation areas are available as 1 for 0L, and 32 for 2L. 

Is there anyway to create new depreciation areas on public cloud environment?

Thanks to all.

entry.title: Re: Can I build the P.R release strategy based on requisi...
entry.content: Thanks too much Raheel

entry.title: Re: Spool file authority setting
entry.content:
Hi Nic, 

this is no solution for me because I want to catch all spool files not depending which program create a spool in which technology.

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI 8.00 Command Line Installation
entry.content: Yes it worked, thanks.

entry.title: Re: Number Ranges for In-House Repair
entry.content:
Hi,

Go to SNRO and try the following

  • CRM_REPAIR 01 - for REPA
  • CRM_SERVIC 01 for REPO
  • CRM_SERVIC 01 or other for other transactions

you can check the assigment of transaction - number range in 

  • Service
    • Transactions
      • Basic Settings
        • Define Transaction Types

entry.title: 🇵🇱 SAP CodeJam SAP Fiori elements flexible programming model (Wroclaw, Poland)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is about the SAP Fiori elements flexible programming model (FPM). After a quick introduction to UI5, we will dive into the SAP Fiori elements and learn how to build a web application that allows users to browse and order books. Using the FPM, we will customise this SAP Fiori elements application. With this hands-on experience, you will be able to start developing your own SAP Fiori elements applications after this CodeJam.

The content for this SAP CodeJam is available on GitHub: https://github.com/SAP-samples/fiori-elements-fpm-exercises-codejam

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Friday 05 July 2024 from 09:00 - 15:00 local time. We will meet on the 3rd floor in room 303 (Fabryczna 14G, 53-609 Wroclaw). The language of the event and the content will be English. 

The instructor will be Developer Advocate Nico Schoenteich.

This SAP CodeJam coincides with the SAP Inside Track Wroclaw on the following day.

Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 25 attendees. Register here in the Community Event using the RSVP functionality.

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

entry.title: Re: Looping Process Call and Poll Enrich to read multiple...
entry.content:
Hi Abhinav,

No GUI is available to see the idempotent repository entries but you can use the api.sap.com API to handle entries in the idempotent repository: https://api.sap.com/api/MessageProcessingLogs/resource/Idempotent_Repository

In the resources you can get and delete entries from the repository. Important to note is that you need to know the ID of the entry to be able to get the required information to be able to delete an entry.

We created an integration which handles the calls only input is in our case a body with 1 or multiple IDs to be cleaned from idempotent repository but using the apis directly is also an option.

Hopefully this is helpfull.

Kind regards, 

Jordy

entry.title: Re: An introduction into Service Management in S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
entry.content: I see this is specifically for private cloud. Is there any information or differences for public cloud and using Service Management?

entry.title: Re: The system URL is using a self-signed security certif...
entry.content:
Hi,

I may have a solution for you. It's not a secure solution, but it may help you get out of the situation until you find one, can you test this:

Set the windows environnement user variable "NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED = 0" and restart vscode

I hope this help you.

Regards.

skrime

entry.title: Re: SAP Finance enablement available on learning.sap.com

    • SAP S/4HANA Finance,
 
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Java CAP application to upload a parquet file
entry.content:
Hi Team,
I am new to CAP. I am building a java CAP application with spring boot and ODATA 4.
My requirement is to provide an api to upload a parquet file. The issue is whenever I am making the API call its returning me below error - 

{
"error": {
"code": "406",
"message": "The content type 'multipart/form-data;boundary=--------------------------939382535059353686856461' is not supported."
}
}
 
Here's my CDS file 
namespace test;

entity Upload {
  file : LargeBinary @Core.MediaType: 'multipart/form-data';
}

 an there is Handler which implements EventHandler.
In regular spring boot app if I accept Multipart file using @RequestParam, it works fine.
Could you please help me to solve this issue?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Hi experts Which table to refer to view physical qty...
entry.content: Hi Faraz Rahim , Thank you for your response

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 2 - Words as Ve
entry.content: I fixed the "cannot allocate enough memory..." error by increasing the statement_memory_limit_threshold up to 80% in the global.ini file, section: memorymanager.

entry.title: Re: conditional breaks Adobe Form
entry.content: Hmmm, looks like you do not have a reference to the table lt_main_asset in your conditional break statement. It would also be simpler to use subforms instead of table rows for your layout.

entry.title: Fields in FIORI / GUI - availability and description, tables
entry.content:
Hi guys, I'm wondering if some of you tried to search the name of the field and table for Fiori app ? I'm asking because I have two cases:

1. My client want to use mostly FIORI and I can't reach some fields that are available in GUI - Action Box

1. In FIORI app F2023 - Report Malfunction is available field name "Effect", is any possibility to find it in GUI?

entry.title: Re: External API / Web Service integration with SAP Digital Manufacturing - Demystified!
entry.content:
Hi @swaroop_anasane ,

Thank you for your post. It was really helpful.

Could please let me know how did you connect the production process to the Data collection. I could call the value from POD by assigning the actions to the data collection plugin. But the value the production process creates couldnt be fetched in the value tab. It remains blank.

 

Could you please let me know how to solve this. Thank you. 

Regards,
Sayuj.

entry.title: Re: Service Contract invoicing incorrect
entry.content: Hello Jenny, please update the SAP Managed Tag as the product you have tagged is not correnct. SAP Sourcing and SAP Contract Lifecycle Management is an On Premise product that does not offer invoicing. Did you mean to tag an SAP Ariba product?

entry.title: Replacing a wrapped BAPI with a released business object interface
entry.content:
Last year, I announced the release of the Mitigate Missing Released SAP API in the 3-tier Extensibility Model tutorial group via the ABAP Cloud – Mitigate missing released SAP APIs in the 3-tier extensibility model: a tutorial how to wrap a BAPI and integrate it into a custom RAP business object blog. The tutorial group shows how to wrap the BAPI_PR_CREATE function module (BAPI) in tier 2, how to release it for consumption in tier 1, and then how to consume it from a shopping cart RAP business object in tier 1.

We have just extended the tutorial group with the Replace Wrapper by Released API tutorial. As the name suggests, this tutorial shows how to replace the wrapper once a released API is available. That is, the wrapper for the BAPI_PR_CREATE function module is replaced by the released I_PurchaseRequisitionTP business object interface. Since the business object interface is already available, you can try it out immediately. So, don't hesitate and get your hands dirty 😉

entry.title: Re: Is Joule no more available in Trail Account BAS
entry.content:
Somehow it' s working now.

Pls skip this discussion.
Requested moderator via email sapnetwork@sap.com to remove this post.

entry.title: Re: KeyCloak Identity Provision and Authentication for SAP CloudFoundry - Part 1
entry.content:
Part 2

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/keycloak-identity-provision-and-authentication-for-sap-cloudfoundry-part-2/ba-p/13451728

entry.title: Re: BTP Integration Suite API Management and Stage Releva...
entry.content:
Hi Jordy,

thank you so much for your answer.

I tried KVMs but i'm a bit concerned about the performance of it, compared to a somehow "hard-wired" variable value during the transport / cd process.
Plus the fact of "manual"-maintaining the KVM on each stage, brought me to the conclusion to try finding an alternate way.

As another requirement is to alter a custom attribute on products, which are stage relevant.

My setup is like the following:

API Proxy is a generic proxy to a service provider, but the actual product defines the authorization:
1 API Proxy => 2 Products
Product 1 requires Basic Auth (Policy is adapted to it)

Product 2 requies a remote IDP with different host per stage, which is bound to the actual product.

The proxy policy enforces it by check the flow variables either to go left or right.

But I face the same challenge as if i'm using KVMs that i need to adapt product configuration on each stage individually.

I know with KVMs u could have the assign variable step as a generic thing in your proxy policy, but i'm not a real fan of the "configure afterwards" scenario.

Best,

Alex

entry.title: Re: Optimizing TM-EWM & TM-GTS integration by leveraging FEH resolution strategies
entry.content:
Hi Erik,
Thanks for the feedback. Will update the Typo and add more details the earliest. 

Thanks & Regards,
Saravana S

Can you guys please help me how this can be achieved.

entry.title: Change default repair process types REPO REPA REPQ
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to change default repair process types, eg REPO for ZREO etc.

I did the configuration according to instructions:

  1. Defined new process type (copied REPO) in CRMC_PROC_TYPE
  2. Defined items for new process
  3. Set REPO as inactive in CRMC_PROC_TYPE-PROCESS_BLOCKED = X
  4. Set copying REPA -> ZREO in CRMC_PR_COPY_MA

And it's not working.

Do you know how to change it?

entry.title: Re: Homogeneous system copy from Prod to Quality on Windows/MSSQL
entry.content: Here is the translation to English: Regarding the topic, I'm interested in doing it the same way, but on the destination server I only have SQL Server installed. What are the steps I need to perform a system copy?

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP - UI refresh after static action call
entry.content: You can use the SideEffects to trigger a refresh of entity based on action. This worked for me.

entry.title: Error M3897 raised with parallel posting
entry.content:
While posting the Goods movement documents parallelly for same material and Plant combination, below error raised:
The plant data of the material & is locked by the user &


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Error M3897 raised with parallel posting
entry.content:
Kindly go through the below documented KBA on the lock issue for simultaneous goods movement posting:
2528025 - M3897 for non valuated material 

As mentioned, The lock is not only necessary to avoid quantity inconsistencies caused by parallel goods movements but it also prevents changes to the material master. There is information on plant level that would have a hazardous impact if changed during a goods movement. 

Also, in order to avoid inconsistencies the Table MARC will be locked, this is as per system standard behavior.

entry.title: Inbound Communication on SAP BTP and Cloud Foundry Application
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm studying the SAP BTP and have a question about it.

Here’s the scenario: from C4C, using a webhook (triggered by a ticket update), an HTTP request is sent to an application (python-based) I developed and deployed on Cloud Foundry in the BTP. This application performs certain tasks and then connects to the SAP AI Core service.

My concern is about managing communications securely (authentication, etc.) both inbound and outbound from my application. If I understand correctly, I can use "destinations" to manage outbound communications. However, it's not clear to me how to handle inbound communications: at the moment, anyone who has the endpoint where my application is exposed can access the service. So, how do I implement an authentication mechanism?

I’ve looked through the documentation, the Learning Hub, and community blogs, but I’m a little bit confused. For example, I learned about the XSUAA service, but it permits to design a login form for any user, that is not what I need, since I want a secure communication between C4C and my application.

entry.title: Help in getting Vacant Positions using the Incumbent First Name & Last Name columns
entry.content:
I am trying to get all vacant positions for Succession Planning and ideally, a table for export of all vacant positions and positions with incumbent as of date in one table.

  • I thought that filtering for Incumbent name = Null would get me all vacant positions.
  • Issue: When I filtered for Incumbent name = Null, this only included positions where there was never an incumbent ever. This excluded positions whose previous incumbents had left the company already (Employee Status = Terminated).

First, I set my Time Filter for Incumbents to Today (same as the first table). I was thinking, this should only give Active incumbents AND incumbent field that is blank (terminated incumbents OR no one was ever in that position). But, I am getting even terminated ones and multiple rows for some positions even.

Next, I created a calculated field in the query to calculate if an Incumbent field (Concatenated field of incumbent first and last name) is blank or with a terminated employee status = 0.

This is what I got. But in my table, I only want to show those in green highlight (no incumbents and active incumbents).

Note: I have created a canvas advanced reporting with the same date filters of incumbents as of today and I got all active incumbents and blank incumbents into one report.

Is there a way to achieve this (same as advanced reporting) in Story?

SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics

entry.title: SAP ASE TLS 1.3 support
entry.content: KBA 2942212 from September 2020 says SAP ASE did not support TLS 1.3. Did anything change since then? I could not find any updated info about that (not even for CR 822063 which is the new feature request created back then).

entry.title: Re: Custom field from timesheet to pricing for customer p...
entry.content:
Hi @WesleyZhang,

The problem we are facing is that the custom field in the timesheet is not in the same "Business Context" as the one that we can use for pricing.

We would like to know if there is a way for us to either have a single custom field that we could use in the timesheet and the pricing.

Alternatively, would there be a way for us to "link" a custom field on the timesheet with a custom field in the pricing so that the action on the custom field in the timesheet would affect the pricing of the follow-on billing documents?

For the second option we checked whether a BADI was available to link information on the timesheet to pricing information but couldn't find any.

Could you please let us know if that would be possible?

Thanks,

entry.title: Hello Everyone!
entry.content: Starting my SAP learning journey now! Hoping to learn a lot from this community.

entry.title: Re: Performance issues in FSE2/FSE3 on S4Hana 2022 Privat...
entry.content: We found the solution if you are curious this was due to issues in the design of Security roles related to UIM Masking. SAP support had a very hard time uncovering this and it seems that S/4 Hana private 2022 has some deficiencies around Masking that have been resolved in 2023.

entry.title: Re: issue with multiple discount determination at sales o...
entry.content: not able to replicate issue at all, tried multiple times, sales order pricing tab showing 11 conditions, they all have same KNUMH number = duplicates

at this point I cannot provide any futher support. 

Other members from this SAP Builders group may weigh-in with their own ideas for a solution.

I hope the other experts or peers can chime in on these issues.

Margit

entry.title: 'Generate Mappings' or AI-functionality for emission factor mapping not working in SAP SFM
entry.content:
Hello all & @NicoWottke 

After the smooth SAP demo on AI functionality in SFM last week I'm trying out the new functionality called 'Generate Mappings' in SAP SFM to automatically map Emission Factors to Products. Unfortunately this is not working and I'm getting an error message that I'm not able to solve.  

I think I have created proper Products to be matched with entries from a file with Emissions factors, but I get the message 'No emission factor found. Maintain an emission factor in the Manage Emission Factors app and import again.'

The emissions factors seem fine:

And when I choose the option 'Assign manually' and then 'Map manually' in the 'Manage Purchased Product Footprints' it does propose the correct:

Does anybody have an idea what I'm doing wrong and what could cause this error? 

Thanks for any help & kind regards,

Erik

entry.title: Trigger a workflow activation from BUS object

How to trigger a workflow activation when a business transaction object (bus2000115) is SETTORELEASE.

Can a bussiness transaction be an inquiry creation?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Multiple data source connected to single process in S...
entry.content:
Hi there ghemraj, 

thank you for your question!

It is be possible to connect two data sources to a process in SAP Signavio Process Intelligence, however this is not an out-of-the-box feature in the platform but would have to be custom-built and set up depending on your source systems and input data. Our consulting team should be able to help you with the setup. 

If you are interested to find out more, please reach out to your Account Executive to discuss the available consulting options.

Thank you and best regards, 

Katie

entry.title: Workflow not triggering when importing sales orders
entry.content: My workflow is setup correctly because when I create orders via Manage sales orders, the workflow triggers immediately. However when importing via the excel spreadsheet in the Import sales orders app, the workflow does not trigger. Please assist.

entry.title: Re: NC Disposition via SAPME PAPI: Find Disposition Options
entry.content:
Hello,

I don't know, about that PAPI, but an alternative approach could be to use  NCProductionService.dispositionMultipleSfcs() and pass only the SFC, Operation and Resource. It is the equivalent of the Done button in the POD so should pick the highest priority NC for dispositioning.

-Andrew.

Do I need a specific role for that? Is it depend on a version or specific process?

Thanks

 

#Visibility Scenario

If I can remember it from 8-10 years ago, the BW reports can be launched without the portal too, right? You could move to fiori launchpad and create URL tiles to the BW reports. 

Regards,

Noël

entry.title: Re: Trigger a workflow activation from BUS object
entry.content:
more information:  I want to block an inquiry creation from a workflow.
In order to block it the system is generating the workflow from a bus object bus20000115 status set to release.
Then you can wait for approval and change the status again so the inquiry can be saved.
How can I do the entire customizing?

entry.title: GitHub sample for working with SAP Datasphere and SAP Data Quality Management, microservices
entry.content:
We are pleased to announce our latest GitHub sample, which demonstrates how to utilize SAP Data Quality Management microservices for location data for preparing data in SAP Datasphere. This sample provides insights into reading and writing data in SAP Datasphere using Open SQL Schema. For detailed information on Open SQL Schemas, please refer to the SAP Datasphere documentation: Integrating Data via Database Users/Open SQL Schemas.

Samples for SAP Data Quality Management, microservices for location data

Our sample can be found in the SAP-samples / cloud-dqm-sample-payloads repository.

 

Within this repository, you will find the following folders:

/ datasphere-geo-map

This repository contains the SAP Datasphere data model objects for preparing data to be sent to the microservices for location data and consuming the result data from the microservices. The API calls to the microservices are invoked from the sample Python script. The final model object is ultimately used in a Geo Map widget in SAP Analytics Cloud Story.

/ datasphere-python

This repository contains a Python script to retrieve address data from the user space in SAP Datasphere, invoke the calls to the microservices for location data to obtain the corresponding location data, and subsequently write the results to a table within the Open SQL Schema in SAP Datasphere.

/ postman-collections

This repository contains Postman scripts that showcase various API payloads for different countries. These scripts can be utilized for API testing prior to invoking them from Python scripts or UI applications.

In summary, our sample repositories provide a Python script for invoking the API call to SAP Data Quality Management microservices for location data, as well as SAP Datasphere objects that enable you to consume location data and model it for visualization in the Geo Map widget of SAP Analytics Cloud stories. We hope that this resource will serve as a valuable starting point for leveraging the microservices in your own use cases and effectively preparing data in SAP Datasphere.

entry.title: MDK Mobile application - QueryOptions - filter - diacritics
entry.content:
In mobile applications like SAP Asset Manager users can filter results. The filter(search in pages) is case insensitive because everything is set - tolower(string). That is good. And then the "query option" is an exact match. But is there a way how to make filters (query option) not exact match - ignoring diacritics?

For example. When a work order is named "Plán" (with diacritics), but a user types the word "Plan" (without diacritics) into a search field, the user gets zero results. It is obvious why, because 'a' != 'á'. But is there a way how to show results with similar words - with diacritics and vice versa?

entry.title: T-Code LTS > Landscape Transformation v2 website | all iFrames fail to display help.sap.com content
entry.content:
Dear friends,

struggling with a failure regarding 

X-FRAME-OPTIONS  and SAMEORIGIN

but I am not even sure on which side the problem is sourced. Does help.sap.com has this feature active?

I tried whitelisting with the table HTTP_WHITELIST utilized including the Handler List for the SICF service LTS also with custom IF-class to modify the header and finally I even tried utilizing T-Code UCONCOCKPIT - Unified Connectivity Cockpit with the HTTP Whitelist scenario to somehow get the help.sap.com enabled as iFrame but nothing helped.

I found quite some notes with iframe, clickjacking and whitelisting topics also addressing web dynpro but nothing which helps or has precisely mentioned LTS.

Did maybe someone else crossed this issue and somehow succeeded with this?

ANY help is much appreciated.

Kind regards 

BW

entry.title: Re: Scripting Tracker - SAP Window not found
entry.content:
Hi @stefan_schnell,

I'm not able to look at that information in the tool.  The File menu only has the option to exit.  The Tools menu only has the options for Scan and Always on Top.  The Help menu only has the options for Help and About.  All of the drop down options are also the button options that are visible in the screenshot below.  I don't know who in my company to contact for supporting use of the tool because I had a coworker send it my way many years ago and that coworker is no longer here to even ask where he got it.  Fortunately, this will help my case to push my development efforts in the better path than the direction I was looking to go anyway.  Thanks for your support in looking into this.  I'm not sure I see any reason to further investigate.  I don't even have the ability to update the tool myself with my company's security policies that are in place.

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now - Editing standard content in the Exte...
entry.content:
Thanking you Dirk for these responses; they really help me. As suggested, will try out things as well. 

One follow-up question.

Question 06: By default, the standard content fetched lies in the Unsorted folder. Should I manually move to the Root Group folder?

You said No for this question. However, as a best practice, I believe that we need to move even the standard content from Unsorted to Root Group folder. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 SDK Load system form from xml - form already e...
entry.content:
I managed to make some progress. It seems that the unique ids that begin with F_ are reserved. I changed the unique ID to ctrx123 and it proceeded to a point but then I got this error:

Invalid target [66000-24]. Form Unique Id: 'ctrx123', Item Unique Id : '87'

The form opened up but it was missing the tabs

entry.title: Re: search restriction with the following parameters:
entry.content:
The flexible search query returns an empty list as the final query is SELECT {pk} FROM {VariantProduct} WHERE {code} = "PinkCandle" AND 1 = 0; 

As 1 = 0 is False the the where clause returns also false even the PinkCandle exists on the online catalog.

Note: A search restriction applies to the item type and its subtypes.

entry.title: Re: How to connect an HTTP OnPremise destination using Ba...
entry.content:
Hi DhairyaM,

I don't have experience with BTP but with NEO cloud platform (predecessor) you assign an alias name and use that one in your neo-app.json file.

Regards,

Noël

entry.title: Re: SAP BN4L – Manage Dock Appointments: Enabling Role-Based Access
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you very much for this valuable contribution 🙂

Our customer is able to send goods from any plant to any customer with any purchasing organization. The role you are using permits to restrict the geographical responsabilities but as far as i know and from my personal investigations, I figured out that there is not any possibility to restrict the DAS applications on the ordering party of the Freight Order. Do you have the same level of understanding ? 

Best regards,

Adrien MANIER

entry.title: Where can I start learning the functions of SAP HANA Scale-Out and SAP HANA system replication?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Setting up High Availability and Disaster Recovery for SAP HANA learning journey

Overview
After completing this learning journey, as an SAP HANA database administrator, you will know the functions of SAP HANA Scale-Out and SAP HANA system replication. You will learn how to set up, configure and manage SAP HANA scale-out systems and understand what happens in the event of a worker and/or coordinator node failure. In the second part of this learning journey, you will learn how to set up and configure SAP HANA system replication. You will also configure the advanced system replication features such as active/active and time travel.

Learning objectives

  • Understand how to use SAP HANA scale-out systems to increase the high availability.
  • Setup and configure SAP HANA scale-out systems.
  • Know how to use SAP HANA system replication to increase the disaster tolerance of the system.
  • Setup and configure SAP HANA system replication including the advanced features active/active and time travel.
  • Understand how to use tenant replication.

Prerequisites
Basic knowledge:

  • Linux Administration
  • Linux operating system clustering
  • Learning journey: Installing and Administering SAP HANA 

 

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.We appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

entry.title: How can I convert a array of a memberinfo to a singlevariablevalue
entry.content:
Hi there,

I'm not that familiar with SAC yet. My goal is to get selected values (customer numbers) from different InputControls (different hierarchies) into a dynamic text via a script variable. There should only be one text passage in the report where the selected customer number appears.

In the first attempt I used this coding, which does not work due to this error message.

var KH1 = InputControl_1.getInputControlDataSource().getActiveSelectedMembers();

var KH1_T = cast(Type.SingleVariableValue, KH1); // --> this error message appears here: Invalid argument at Index 2: Cannot convert from "Array of Memberinfo" to SingleVariableValue

vCustomerNumber1 = KH1_T; // vCustomerNumber1 --> Script Variable

Does anyone have an idea how I could solve this problem?

Many thanks in advance!

VG
Wolf

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Continuous Stock with Germany Localization
entry.content: It may look like a naive question, but not knowing what the common accounting practices in Germany I can't know if there is any standard management inventory system or not. For example, in Italy there is virtually no company using the perpetual inventory with continuous stock. The common practice here is not using the continuous stock producing automatic entries in the general ledger any time you move a part number in stock, we calculate the value of the stock at the end of the period and we "plug" the value in into the general ledger. But working extensively with US, I know the common practice there is using the Continuous Stock, so this is the reason why I'm asking about Germany.

entry.title: Re: How to create additional depreciation areas in public...
entry.content:
Hi @BORDRILL,

Could you please confirm if you activated the scope item 5FK?

Please note that both scope items Asset Accounting – Additional Depreciation Area (5HG) and Asset Under Construction – Additional Depreciation Area (5KF) can only be activated during the scoping phase in SAP Central Business Configuration.

These can also be identified in SAP Process Navigator with the corresponding Tool tip:

The scope item 6VB is not available for all the countries/industries.

Hope this helps.

Arturo Montes de Oca

entry.title: Re: call unbound RAP action from CAP
entry.content: @akuller_q I've tried calling RAP unbound action/function in and I also think the implementation is off. The IsBound flag seems to be true, regardless of what I did in the RAP v4 service (declaring it static). I had to make it Odata v2 for it to work

entry.title: Remote Monitoring of HANA Database from Solman
entry.content:
As I find many SAP HANA databases wrongly configured in Solman for efficient, I felt there's a need to publish the steps I follow for the benefit of many.

#Note All the screenshots are taken by me from my internal system 

1. Install DBSL Libraries for remote monitoring of HANA DB

If Solman and the target database are on different databases, install HANA DBSL libraries on solman host for data collection.

2. Install Diagnostic Agent on HANA DB host

Once the agent is installed, check if the host agent is able to communicate with the diagnostic agent. The Result should be GREEN.

dbbwq02:/usr/sap/hostctrl/exe # ./sapcontrol -nr 98 -function GetSystemInstanceList

 

 

 

3. Setup Monitoring User in HANA DB ( System and Tenant )

We have to create a DB user in HANA, which is used for communication between Solman and remote HANA DB. The users are to be created without an option to force password change after logon.

The roles, that this user will need are:

Tenant DB :

System DB

Once the user IDs are created, we have to make the password not expire.

Also, the priority of the user to be set to 8 and above to ensure, the user will be allowed to communicate under heavy loads as well.

ALTER USER SM_MONITOR DISABLE PASSWORD LIFETIME;

ALTER USER SM_MONITOR SET PARAMETER PRIORITY='8'

4. Setup HDBUSERSTORE for the Monitoring User

Execute the above command with SIDadm user.

Path : /usr/sap/SID/SYS/exe/hdb

Check existing keys available.

We have to create two keys for system and tenant DBs.

The key name should be of format <SID>SAPDBCTRL for SYSTEMDB and as <SID>SAPDBCTRL<Tenant DB SID>

System DB:

Password is masked in RED

The port used in the above command is the SQL Port of System DB.

The SQL Port can be found in HANA Studio under Landscape.

./hdbuserstore SET Q02SAPDBCTRL dbbwq02:30013 USER PASSWORD

Tenant DB:

Same as above, only the Key name, SQL port and user details changes.

Next, we need to test if the host agent is able to retrieve the HANA database details.

dbbwq02:/usr/sap/hostctrl/exe # ./saphostctrl -function GetDatabaseSystemStatus -dbname SYSTEMDB@Q02 -dbtype hdb

Host Agent successfully retrieves HANA DB details

dbbwq02:/usr/sap/hostctrl/exe # ./saphostctrl -function GetDatabaseSystemStatus -dbname Q02@Q02 -dbtype hdb

dbbwq02:/usr/sap/hostctrl/exe # ./saphostctrl -function GetDatabaseProperties -dbname Q02 -dbtype hdb

dbbwq02:/usr/sap/hostctrl/exe # ./saphostctrl -function GetDatabaseStatus -dbname Q02 -dbtype hdb

5. Register HANA DB in SLD

HANA DB is registered in SLD using hdblcm.

dbbwq02:/hana/shared/Q02/hdblcm # ./hdblcm

Choose 5.

Push data to SLD manually using the config file created using hdblcm.

./sldreg -connectfile /usr/sap/Q02/SYS/global/slddest.cfg -file /usr/sap/Q02/HDB00/dbbwq02/trace/sldreg.xml

6. Review SLD and LMDB Content

Verify SLD and ensure, we have more than 11 associations for system and tenant DB. This is to ensure all the data from HANA DB is captured by the SLD registration.

Use the same SQL port which was used in HDBUSERSTORE setup.

Once saved, go to SE38 and execute report ADBC_TEST_CONNECTION and choose DB connection which was setup now.

8. Perform Managed System Configuration

 Go to SOLMAN_SETUP and choose managed system configuration and select the System ID for HANA DB.

Ensure that the used DB-Connect String and DB-Connect String in LMDB are the same.

9. Assign Templates for Monitoring

Assign HANA DB templates to both system and tenant DBs.

entry.title: Re: depreciation key for Austria - half year depreciation
entry.content: I have the same problem. Which is the correct depr. key in SAP cloud for Austria?

entry.title: Re: Sub-contracting MRP area not showing in MD04
entry.content:
Hello

Please run the report to create planning file entries (PPH_DBVM) and check MD04 again. 

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Re: BAPI for Asset Retirement
entry.content:
Dario, 

 

The Partial Reteriment Option allows you to define Currenty Year or Prior Year Acquisition that will be used to determine the Asset Transaction Type.

Transaction type is needed when you post either a complete retirement or a complete transfer of an asset that has both prior-year acquisitions and acquisitions in the current fiscal year. The system uses this transaction type for the posting that involves the current-year acquisitions.

This is necessary for reports, in order to separate the current acquisitions and their depreciation from prior-year acquisitions.

By using the BAPI, you should determine by using the BAPI parameters.

BR,

 

Gabriel Coleti

entry.title: Re: The item table update always ends with runtime error...
entry.content:
Hi, RAP experts,I know the issue comes from the following sentence . The attachment is the content of it_instance . But I don’t know why this table can not be updated

TRANSPORTATIONORDERITEM TRANSPORTATIONORDERUUID TRANSPORDITEM TRANSPORDITEMTYPE TRANSPORDITEMCATEGORY TRANSPORDITEMDESC SOURCESTOPUUID DESTINATIONSTOPUUID SHIPPERUUID SHIPPER SHIPPERADDRESSID CONSIGNEEUUID CONSIGNEE CONSIGNEEADDRESSID TRANSPBASEDOCUMENT TRANSPBASEDOCUMENTTYPE TRANSPBASEDOCUMENTITEM TRANSPORTATIONEQUIPMENTG TRANSPORTATIONEQUIPMENTT TRANSPEQUIPMENTPLATENUM TRANSPEQUIPREGISTRATION TRANSPORDITEMPACKAGEID PRODUCTID MATERIALFREIGHTGROUP TRANSPORTATIONGROUP TRANSPORDITEMQUANTITY TRANSPORDITEMQUANTITYU TRANSPORDITEMGROSSWEIG TRANSPORDITEMGROSSWE2 TRANSPORDITEMGROSSVOLU TRANSPORDITEMGROSSVO2 TRANSPORDITEMNETWEIGHT TRANSPORDITEMNETWEIG2 TRANSPORDITEMDNGRSGDS REPOSITORYID FILEOBJECTID %CONTROL
9500B914D0251EDF8AA9F165C84D3386 9500B914D0251EDF8AA9F165C84D1386 1000000 TRUC AVR 9500B914D0251EDF8AA9F165C84D5386 9500B914D0251EDF8AA9F165C84D7386 00000000000000000000000000000000 00000000000000000000000000000000 STR STR012 0.000 0.000 TO 0.000 M3 0.000 TO zfoattachment001 ATgBV0T_lnIa3SmZhVtdSnU1QfmuFCHgXxmlj_v17L4 Structure: flat, not charlike0

entry.title: Error message requesting more days than you have in your balance
entry.content:
hello all,

"Sorry, you can’t request NN days. You’ve only got NN days of leave left"

the message that appear from the system when you try to request more days than you have in your balance, is different in Norwegian. In Norwegian the message says "ferie" even if it is a sick child request. And ferie is more related with "vacation". It is possible to modify this standard messages? it is not a message in a take rule. 

 

thanks in advance

 

Nuria

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Munich 2024 - Call for Papers 📢
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

We are delighted to announce that the SAP Inside Track Munich 2024 will take place on 12th of October. This is a fantastic opportunity for everyone to share their knowledge, exchange experiences, and connect with like-minded individuals. We invite you all to participate in the Call for Papers and share your expertise with the community. Whether you are an SAP expert, developer, consultant, or user, your contributions are welcome!

If you have any questions or need assistance with topic selection, feel free to email us at
contact@sitmuc.com. We are here to help!

Submission Details:

  • Submission Deadline: 13th of July 2024
  • Submission Process:
    Please submit your proposal using our online form:     https://sitmuc.cfapps.eu12.hana.ondemand.com

There are various session types for your submissions:

  • Short Presentation (20 min)
  • Presentation (40 min)
  • Marketplace

In a Presentation, you will present a topic to the audience - demos, theory, live coding, or anything else that suits your expertise. In a Marketplace slot, you will share your topic in a “marketplace” breakout session where everyone is welcome to walk around, visit the various stands, and interact. You can choose the most suitable duration.

Please note that you are expected to attend the event in person in Munich.

Join us at SAP Inside Track Munich 2024 and actively contribute to the SAP community!
Looking forward to your submissions and to welcoming you in Munich.

Best regards,
sitMUC Orga team

entry.title: Re: Introducing sap.ui.mdc – A New Generation of Smart Controls
entry.content:
@bendkt 

 

I am currently working on a project in SAPUI version 1.120

I'm check that MDC was released in EXPERIMENTAL in 1.124 version and can be used in the PRODUCTION environment.

However, it still appears to be EXPERIMENTAL in version 1.120 version...

Will MDC be officially released in version 1.120 someday?
